fileContent:
# ============================================
# Portfolio Environment Variables
# ============================================
#
# Copy this file to .env and fill in your values
# Never commit .env to version control!

# --------------------------------------------
# Required: AI Chat Integration
# --------------------------------------------
# Get your NVIDIA API key from: https://build.nvidia.com/explore/discover
# This enables the interactive terminal chatbot feature
# NVIDIA uses OpenAI-compatible API format
NVIDIA_API_KEY=your_nvidia_api_key_here
NVIDIA_MODEL=meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct
# Alternative models: meta/llama-3.1-405b-instruct, nvdev/nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-70b-instruct

# --------------------------------------------
# Optional: Site Configuration
# --------------------------------------------
# Your production website URL (used for SEO and sitemap generation)
# PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://yourusername.vercel.app

# --------------------------------------------
# Optional: Analytics (if using Vercel Analytics)
# --------------------------------------------
# These are typically auto-configured by Vercel
# VERCEL_ANALYTICS_ID=your_analytics_id
# VERCEL_ENV=production
